framework.name: Platform-Based Agent Monetization (ZBrain Model)
framework.description: Hackett Group's ZBrain platform represents a 'low-code enterprise-grade Gen AI orchestration platform' model where agent deployment is standardized through pre-built templates, data connectors (200+), and multi-agent orchestration. This suggests a potential monetization path: build a platform that non-technical plant managers can use to deploy agents, charge for platform access + usage.
framework.raw_quote: ZBrain™ is a low-code, enterprise-grade Gen AI orchestration platform designed to build and deploy AI agents at scale. Its intuitive interface empowers teams to build and iterate on complex business logic rapidly, while a library of pre-built agents and templates accelerates time-to-value for high-impact use cases.
